criteria.reason: Outreach artifacts are represented as product stages in the run review journal.
Journal details expose source, counts, filters, channels, queue state, and no-send boundary.
Production smoke confirmed prospectingleads sourcing, approvals, drafts, queue, and no dispatcher.
Local checks, deploy verification, and production smoke passed.

commands_run: partial deploy via scp and docker compose restart app worker
docker compose exec -T app env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python /app/scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_outreach_api.py
docker compose ps && docker compose logs --since 10m app | tail -n 160 && curl -I http://localhost:8000
